texas_v10_rule_basis: Preserve noindex until all critical families are verified
District-grade routing must use direct local or district-owned evidence, not generic or statewide fallback
Legacy/inventory-only evidence does not satisfy California-grade completeness

final_blockers.evidence: Bounded probes to official New Hampshire Department of Education district-profile and school-directory paths returned HTTP 403, so no reviewed district- or county-grade education routing chain is preserved on disk.

The packet's current VR root `dhhs.new-hampshire.gov/rehab` does not resolve, and bounded probes to likely official Bureau of Vocational Rehabilitation paths on `education.nh.gov` returned HTTP 403, so no reviewed first-party VR or Pre-ETS artifact is preserved on disk.

The legacy county-office evidence still depends on DOI-derived rows, while bounded probes to official New Hampshire DHHS contact and district-office paths returned HTTP 403 and did not preserve a reviewed county-owned local routing directory.
